_comment: Lowercase connective words that may appear inside an organization or person name ('Bank of America', 'Tribunal de commerce des Sables-d'Olonne', 'Marks & Spencer'). The false-positive filter treats a run of these between capitalized tokens as part of the name rather than trailing prose. Grammar (prepositions, coordinating conjunctions, ampersand); every language's list is unioned at assemble time.
